explanation: This is the original true positive command and serves as the baseline for testing.
Inserted an extra backslash in the path to test path normalization and parsing behavior.
Removed quotes around the executable path to test if the command still triggers the rule without them.
Replaced 'WINDOWS' with 'WINNT' as an alternative directory name commonly used in Windows.
Capitalized 'keymgr' to 'KeyMgr' to test case-insensitive detection behavior.
Lowercased 'KRShowKeyMgr' to 'krshowkeymgr' to test case-insensitive detection behavior.
Inserted an extra space between the comma and the second argument to test parsing tolerance.
Used short path notation for testing if the rule is path-agnostic.
Removed quotes around the executable path to test if the rule is sensitive to quoted paths.
Used the executable name without the full path to test if the rule is path-agnostic.
